results.question: How do I request VPN access?
results.answer: To request VPN access, submit a ticket through the IT Service Portal under "Network Access > VPN Request". Include your manager's name for approval. [vpn_access.md]

results.question: How long does VPN access approval take?
results.answer: VPN requests are typically approved within 1 business day [vpn_access.md].

results.question: Which client do I use to connect to the VPN?
results.answer: I do not have enough information in the knowledge base.

results.question: How do I reset my password?
results.answer: To reset your password, visit the Self-Service Password Reset portal at reset.company-sample.net and verify your identity using multi-factor authentication before setting a new password [password_reset_policy.pdf].

results.question: What are the password requirements?
results.answer: Passwords must be at least 12 characters long and include one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character. [password_reset_policy.pdf]

results.question: What happens after multiple failed login attempts?
results.answer: After five failed login attempts, your account is locked for 30 minutes [password_reset_policy.pdf].

results.question: How many days of annual leave do employees get?
results.answer: [leave_policy.txt] - ## Section 1: Annual Leave Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per calendar year.

results.question: How long does that approval take?
results.answer: Approval Time VPN requests are typically approved within 1 business day. Requests submitted after 5 PM are processed the next working day. [vpn_access.md]

results.question: And how often do they expire?
How many of those can I carry forward?
results.answer: [leave_policy.txt] - Unused annual leave can be carried forward up to 10 days to next year.
